expectations.text: Spec is generated before the implementation (spec-driven development flow)
Spec includes a function signature definition
Spec covers edge cases (empty list, all duplicates, malformed URLs, network timeout)
expectations.evidence: Edge case table covers these scenarios

expectations.text: Implementation follows the behavior defined in the spec
expectations.evidence: Implementation includes concurrent validation, format checking, and other behaviors defined in the spec
package utils, uses logging library, ctx as first parameter

expectations.text: Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
expectations.evidence: Output saved only to the workspace outputs directory

expectations.text: Spec stays at function granularity (does not inflate into a module-level design doc)
expectations.evidence: Spec includes concurrency design, test points, and file placement suggestions — exceeds the scope of a pure behavioral contract
